campaign.name: Unify & Accelerate
campaign.objective: Generate 150 qualified demo bookings from mid-market engineering teams within 90 days
campaign.targetAudience: Engineering managers and DevOps leads at 50–500 employee organizations managing 50+ SaaS tools, prioritizing cost optimization and developer time protection
campaign.positioning: The only unified observability platform that automatically correlates signals across your entire tech stack, eliminating tool fragmentation while accelerating debugging by 3x
keyMessages: Stop drowning in tool fragmentation—one pane replaces 305+ separate applications
Reclaim developer time: auto-correlation cuts mean-time-to-resolution by 60%
Security-first observability: 99.9% uptime with built-in threat detection

contentPlan.title: The Hidden Cost of Tool Fragmentation: How Engineering Teams Wasted 17 Hours/Week in 2026
contentPlan.purpose: Educate on pain point #1 (tool fragmentation) and establish authority

contentPlan.title: From Chaos to Clarity: Our 5-Step Method for Unifying Your Observability Stack
contentPlan.callToAction: See how we unified a Fortune 500 stack

contentPlan.title: How Mid-Market FinTech Reduced MTTR by 60% Without Adding Headcount
Stop Fragmenting Your Stack: The 2026 Unified Observability Playbook

landingPages.headline: One Platform. Every Signal. No More Tool Fragmentation.
landingPages.subheadline: Automatically correlate data across 300+ SaaS tools. Reclaim 17+ hours/week of engineering time.
landingPages.valueProposition: Unify your fragmented observability stack without rewriting code or replacing existing tools. Our platform automatically correlates signals, reduces MTTR by 60%, and costs less than your current tool sprawl.

landingPages.headline: See How Top Engineering Teams Unified Their Observability
landingPages.subheadline: Book a personalized demo. Our platform cut MTTR by 60% for teams like yours.
landingPages.valueProposition: Watch a 10-minute demo showing real engineering teams reducing debugging time by 60% and eliminating tool sprawl.

landingPages.headline: Download: The 2026 Tool Fragmentation Report
landingPages.subheadline: Discover how engineering teams are wasting 17+ hours/week managing 305+ separate SaaS tools.
landingPages.valueProposition: Get data-driven insights into the hidden costs of tool fragmentation, including benchmarks, ROI calculations, and a 5-step unification roadmap.

salesQualifiedHandoff.sqaThreshold: score >= 60 AND demo booked AND company_size >= 50
salesQualifiedHandoff.handoffProcess: 1. Automated Slack alert to #sales-alerts channel with lead details. 2. SDR reviews lead within 5 minutes. 3. SDR calls within 15 minutes of alert. 4. AE assignment based on territory if score >= 80. 5. CRM auto-creation with all form + behavioral data.
